enonce.texte:
📝 Exercise 1: Match the words with their definitions.

WordDefinition
1. BirthA. A person who belongs to a country
2. NationalityB. The day you were born
3. CitizenC. The place where you were born
4. Date of birthD. The country you belong to
5. Place of birthE. The fact of being born

questions.texte: Match each word with its correct definition.

enonce.texte: 📝 Exercise 2: Complete the sentences with the correct word: birth, nationality, citizen, date of birth, place of birth.

questions.texte: I am a Cameroonian ___________. I belong to Cameroon.
My ___________ is Douala, Cameroon.
My ___________ is Cameroonian because I was born in Cameroon.
The certificate that proves your ___________ is called a birth certificate.

intitule: Exercise 3: Reading and Interpreting a Form

enonce.texte:
📋 Exercise 3: Read the information below and answer the questions.

Identity Card

Name: Amina Ibrahim
Date of Birth: 12th June 2012
Place of Birth: Maroua, Cameroon
Nationality: Cameroonian
Citizen Number: 123456789

questions.texte: What is Amina's date of birth?
Where was Amina born?
What is Amina's nationality?
What is Amina's citizen number?
Is Amina a citizen of Cameroon? Justify your answer.
questions.reponse: Yes, because her nationality is Cameroonian and her place of birth is Cameroon.

enonce.texte: 💬 Exercise 4: Write questions and answers about personal information.

questions.texte:
Ask: What is your nationality?
Answer: ___________

Ask: ___________
Answer: My date of birth is 5th May 2010.
questions.reponse: What is your date of birth?

questions.texte:
Ask: Where were you born?
Answer: ___________
questions.reponse: I was born in Douala, Cameroon.

questions.texte:
Ask: ___________
Answer: Yes, I am a citizen of Cameroon.
questions.reponse: Are you a citizen of Cameroon?

questions.texte:
Ask: ___________
Answer: My place of birth is Bafoussam.
questions.reponse: What is your place of birth? / Where were you born?

enonce.texte:
📄 Exercise 5: Read the birth certificate and answer the questions.

BIRTH CERTIFICATE

Name: Jean Tchakam
Sex: Male
Date of Birth: 20th February 2011
Place of Birth: Ebolowa, Cameroon
Father: Mr. Paul Tchakam - Nationality: Cameroonian
Mother: Mrs. Marie Tchakam - Nationality: Cameroonian

Registered on: 25th February 2011

questions.texte: When was Jean born?
Where was Jean born?
questions.reponse: Jean was born in Ebolowa, Cameroon.

questions.texte: What is the nationality of Jean's parents?
questions.reponse: Both his father and mother are Cameroonian.

questions.texte: When was the birth registered?
What is Jean's nationality? Justify your answer.
questions.reponse: Jean's nationality is Cameroonian because he was born in Cameroon and his parents are Cameroonian.

enonce.texte:
✍️ Exercise 6: Write a short paragraph about yourself.

Instructions:

  • Say your name.
  • Say your date of birth.
  • Say your place of birth.
  • Say your nationality.
  • Say if you are a citizen.

questions.texte: Write 5-6 sentences about your identity.
questions.reponse:
Exemple de réponse :

My name is Marie Tata. My date of birth is 15th March 2012. My place of birth is Yaoundé, Cameroon. My nationality is Cameroonian. I am a citizen of Cameroon. I am proud to be Cameroonian.

enonce.texte:
📊 Exercise 7: Read the chart and answer the questions.

PersonDate of BirthPlace of BirthNationality
Paul10/05/2005Douala, CameroonCameroonian
Alice22/08/2006Paris, FranceFrench
John15/12/2004London, UKBritish

questions.texte: What is Paul's date of birth?
Where was Alice born?
What is John's nationality?
Who was born in Cameroon?
Are all three persons citizens of their countries? Justify.
questions.reponse: Yes, because each person's nationality matches their place of birth: Paul is Cameroonian from Cameroon, Alice is French from France, and John is British from the UK.

enonce.texte:
📝 Exercise 8: Fill out the form with your personal information.

PERSONAL INFORMATION FORM

Full Name: _______________________________

Date of Birth: _______________________________

Place of Birth: _______________________________

Nationality: _______________________________

Are you a citizen? Yes / No

questions.texte: Complete the form with your personal information.
questions.reponse:
Exemple de réponse :

Full Name: Marie Tata

Date of Birth: 15th March 2012

Place of Birth: Yaoundé, Cameroon

Nationality: Cameroonian

Are you a citizen? Yes
